## Summary

Rescues the Story Ledger approval normalizer substrate from closed PR #633 (`feat/story-ledger-approval-normalizer`), which was 325+ commits behind main and never merged. The code builds cleanly against current main with no modifications needed.

**What it adds:**
- `lib/evaluation/review-gate/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.ts` — builds `ledger_user_feedback_v1` and `accepted_story_ledger_v1` artifacts from Review Gate author feedback
- `__tests__/evaluation/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.test.ts` — 8 regression tests covering:
  - Clean accepted feedback → writes feedback + accepted ledger
  - Rejected feedback → writes feedback only, no accepted ledger
  - Non-admin blocked when hard fails remain
  - Admin/operator override allowed
  - Author override rejected
  - All 8 layer dispositions required
  - User corrections applied only to canonical Story Layer keys
  - Phase 2 authority assertion (must use `accepted_story_ledger_v1`)

**Why this matters:** The Review Gate approval flow needs a normalizer that converts author feedback into the immutable `accepted_story_ledger_v1` that Phase 2 craft evaluation consumes as its sole story authority. This is substrate — no runtime wiring, routes, or UI changes.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `lib/evaluation/review-gate/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.ts` (new file)
- `__tests__/evaluation/storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.test.ts` (new file)

**Does NOT touch:**
- No routes, workers, cron, or SQL
- No processor mutations
- No UI changes
- No prompt changes
- No existing file modifications

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Code is a direct port from #633 with no modifications. All 8 tests pass against current main.
- Depends on existing `artifactTypes.ts` and `storyLayerArtifactWriters.ts` exports (verified present on main).

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — new substrate files only, no existing code modified.
